title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 16 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 16/04/2024
Image reference: 2024-04-16_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-16-2024_img1.png
Bulkers : Capesize values decline slightly after strong firming in Q1, other vessels remain stable
Capesize BC HL Harmony (179,700 DWT, Aug 2015, Dalian) sold to Golden Ocean for USD 43.0 mil (TC Back), VV Value USD 44.50 mil
Panamax BC W Raptor (76,500 DWT, Apr 2007, Jiangnan) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 12.8 mil, VV Value USD 13.12 mil
Supramax BC Daidan Mustikawati (55,800 DWT, Jan 2005, Kawasaki) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 11.00 mil, VV Value USD 10.87 mil
Handy BC Susanoo Harmony (37,100 DWT, Oct 2020, Saiki) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 29.50 mil, VV Value USD 29.15 mil
Tankers : Tanker values mostly stable, apart from the slight firming of mid-age VLCCs
Aframax Calypso (111,900 DWT, Jan 2004, Sumitomo) sold to GNMTC for USD 79 mil (DD Due), VV Value USD 79.35 mil
Aframax Izumo Princess (105,400 DWT, Mar 2007, Sumitomo) sold to Undisclosed buyers for USD 37 mil, VV Value USD 36 mil
Containers : Secondhand values firmed for mid-age and more vintage assets in response to higher sales prices in recent weeks
No notable sale
